highlight.title: Cloud Run Gets Multi-Region Health & Manual Scaling
highlight.summary: <cite index="1-11,1-15">Cloud Run now offers multi-region service health with automated failover for external traffic in Preview, plus manual scaling capabilities to override built-in autoscaling.</cite> <cite index="1-25,1-26">New finer-grained IAM roles include Cloud Run Service Invoker and Jobs Executor, making it easier to grant least privilege access to production accounts.</cite>

resources.title: Cloud Run Cost Optimization Best Practices - Updated March 2026
resources.why_now: <cite index="11-20,11-21">Cloud Run's two-tier regional pricing model offers significant savings with Tier 1 regions providing lower costs per vCPU and memory compared to Tier 2 regions.</cite> <cite index="11-25">The new Recommender analyzes your traffic patterns and provides recommendations for switching from request-based to instance-based billing when more cost-effective.</cite>

resources.title: Pub/Sub Lite Discontinuation Impact - March 18, 2026 Deadline
resources.why_now: <cite index="45-8,45-19,45-20">Pub/Sub Lite discontinuation on March 18, 2026 creates substantial cost implications requiring immediate planning, as organizations need to evaluate message lifecycle optimization and alternative architectures to minimize cost impact.</cite> <cite index="45-14,45-15">The discontinuation forces architectural decisions that can increase costs without proper planning, making strategic migration planning critical for maintaining cost efficiency.</cite>

resources.title: App Engine Standard Gets Cloud Run Migration Path
resources.why_now: <cite index="24-3,24-4">App Engine now supports deploying existing standard environment apps to Cloud Run using the gcloud beta app migrate-to-run command in Preview.</cite> <cite index="24-5">Node.js 24 runtime support is now in General Availability, providing a modern runtime option for existing applications.</cite>

resources.title: Secret Manager IAM Best Practices - March 2026 Update
resources.why_now: <cite index="31-19,31-20,31-21">IAM Conditions now allow time-based access control for Secret Manager resources, enabling expirable and scheduled access to secrets based on date/time attributes.</cite> <cite index="31-22,31-23">Resource attributes support conditional access based on secret names and versions, providing granular security control for modern zero-trust architectures.</cite>

claude_take: The March 2026 updates show Google doubling down on cost transparency and developer experience. Cloud Run's new manual scaling and regional pricing guidance address real production pain points, while the Pub/Sub Lite deadline creates an urgent migration priority that many teams aren't prepared for. The App Engine to Cloud Run migration path signals Google's containerization-first strategy moving forward.
